notes: Section 1901, , , , provided for Tariff Commission [now United States International Trade Commission] investigations and reports. See section 2251 et seq. of this title.Pub. L. 87–794, title III, § 30176 Stat. 883Oct. 11, 1962

Section 1902, , , , covered Presidential action after Tariff Commission [now United States International Trade Commission] determination. See section 2252 et seq. of this title.Pub. L. 87–794, title III, § 30276 Stat. 885Oct. 11, 1962
